title:
AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF BARANGAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF
ESPIRITU, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE, TO BARRIO HILARIO VALDEZ.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2048 / 67 OG No. 39, 7666 (September 27, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6224, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF BARANGAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF

ESPIRITU, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE, TO BARRIO HILARIO VALDEZ.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines

in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Barrio of Barangay in the Municipality of Espiritu, Province of Ilocos Norte, is hereby changed to Barrio Hilario Valdez.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
